task_title: Search disagrees with list — figure out why

scores.justification: Agent ran both `ctl search --query "eur" --scope orders` (0 results) and `ctl list orders` (38 EUR records) and demonstrated the disagreement.

Agent identified case sensitivity as the root cause but never identified or tested for a stale search index; the ground truth requires identifying the stale index post-pipe-07 as the actual cause, and the agent's final answer only blames case sensitivity.
Agent never proposed or tested `ctl search --reindex` as a fix; the final answer only recommends matching case or using the `--i` flag.
Agent did not re-run a search after any reindex operation to verify the fix, as no reindex was attempted.
